MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-20-2017 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY ON JUN-19-2017 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. PLAINTIFF SUSAN HOLLAND APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. JAMES LEMIEUX APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT ORDERED PLAINTIFF TO PAY MONETARY SANCTIONS BY 4/28/17 IMPOSED BY THE ORDER FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS FILED 12/30/16 OR THE COURT WILL IMPOSE ADDITIONAL SANCTIONS FOR VIOLATING COURT ORDER. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERED TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE TO 6/19/17 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 AND WILL NOT ENTERTAIN ANY ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE ON THE DAY OF TRIAL. THE COURT WILL CONSIDER ONLY A WRITTEN MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE ON FILE STATING GOOD CAUSE. IF PLAINTIFF IS NOT READY TO GO TO TRIAL ON 6/19/17, THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE CASE. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

HOLLAND IN PROPRIA PERSONA IN SUPPORT OF OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANTS MOTION FOR EVIDENCE SANCTIONS, ISSUE SANCTIONS, TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,315.00, AND IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFFS REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE HEARING DAT (TRANSACTION ID # 16327046) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOLLAND, SUSAN L

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE'S MOTION FOR EVIDENCE SANCTIONS, ISSUE SANCTIONS, TERMINATING SANCTIONS, AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF SUSAN L. HOLLAND IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTION TO AMOUNT OF SANCTIONS IS SUSTAINED. MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE REDUCED BY SUBSTRACTING ANY COURT REPORTER FEE AND SUBSTRACTING 3 HOURS FROM MOVING PARTY COUNSEL'S TIME. OTHERWISE SANCTIONS ARE GRANTED IN FULL. COURT FINDS NO SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR MS. HOLLAND'S DECLINAITON TO RESPOND. THE MOVING PARTY COUNSEL SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312 ANT THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM AND THAT TRACKS EVIDENTIARY SANCTIONS ACCORDING TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. THE [PROPOSED] ORDER SHALL INCLUDE ANY WRITTEN RESPONSES BY MS. HOLLAND IN ACCORDANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE PRO TEM: DOUGLAS ROBBINS; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D302/JPT)

MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-13-2017 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY ON MAR-20-2017 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. NO APPEARACE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT RECEIVED A FAX'ED LETTER FROM PLAINTIFF REGARDING HER MEDICAL CONDITION. THERE BEING NO OBJECTION, THE COURT ORDERED THE TRIAL DATE CONTINUED TO 3/20/17 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERED THAT THERE WILL BE NO FURTHER CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE UNLESS COUNSEL HAS A PROPER MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE ON CALENDAR. THE MOTION NOTICED ON SHORTENED TIME MUST HAVE GOOD CAUSE FOR THE SHORTENED TIME. DEFENDANT WILL GIVE NOTICE. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Evidence Sanctions, Issue Sanctions, Terminating Sanctions, And For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Susan L. Holland In The Amount Of $1,315.00
Off Calendar Nov-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney Susan L. Holland of the law office of Susan L. Holand (415.925.8972) appears telephonically as plaintiff/opposing party, In Propria Persona

Attorney, Randy A. Moss of the law offices of Demler Armstrong & Rowland LLP (415.757.3488, ext 170) appears telephonically as counsel for defendant/moving party

Both sides stipulate to the judge pro tem hearing the matter. The cause is argued and submitted by both sides in open court.

DEFENDANT FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE'S Motion For Evidence Sanctions, Issue Sanctions, Terminating Sanctions, And For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Susan L. Holland is GRANTED. Plaintiff's objection to amount of sanctions is sustained. Monetary sanctions are reduced by subtracting any court reporter fee and subtracting 3 hours from moving party counsel's time. Otherwise sanctions are granted in full. Court finds no substantial justification for Ms. Holland's declination to respond. The moving party counsel shall submit a [proposed] written order that complies with CRC 3.1312 ant that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that tracks evidentiary sanctions according to requests for production of documents. The [proposed] order shall include any written responses by Ms. Holland in accordance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302/jpt)
